creator: mcpaul@earthlink.net
text:
One of their relay servers seems to be down, and all of my mail to them 
comes back unsent. I am hoping that as a software supporter of the IMDB,
you may be able to contact them about the problem.  What happens is my
mail server times out when it tries to connect to their mail server.

How-To-Repeat: Send an e-mail to any address of the IMDB. I tried add@imdb.com.
